summary: A clip from a Fox & Friends interview. An anchor in a suit appears on the left and a man in a tan jacket interviewed via video link on the right, labeled in the lower-third JOE ABRAHAM | DAUGHTER KILLED BY ILLEGAL MIGRANT. The banner reads SANCTUARY POLICIES IN FOCUS, VICTIMS' FAMILIES PUSH FOR IMMIGRATION ACCOUNTABILITY.
